notes: primary MUST equal #1B2B4B in all runs; if not, Rule 8 is broken. The brandColor #1B2B4B is already inside the legal-luxe allowed zone (midnight navy), so the brand-color-exception carve-out is NOT triggered here — but Rule 8 enforcement still applies. All OTHER palette fields (secondary, accent, neutral, primaryLight, primaryDark) must be deeply muted: champagne, warm off-white, charcoal, restrained gold. Absolutely no neon, no bright green, no candy pinks, no fluorescent accents — even as micro-accents.
